rulings.Case Title: HENRY KHACHATURIAN VS. MERRIMAN CURHAN FORD GROUP, INC., A CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration;
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, April 28, 2010, line 8, DEFENDANTS MERRIMAN CURHAN FORD GROUP, INC., MERRIMAN CURHAN FORD & CO., INC., PERSHING LLC, D. MERRIMAN, GREGORY CURHAN, and, ROB FORD Hearing on Petition to Compel Arbitration. Deny. Agreement between Plaintiff and Pershing lacks characteristics of agreement in Macauley vs. Norlander (1992) 12 Cal.App. 4th 1. =(302/AJR)
